title: Vision Transformers vs CNNs: Which One Should You Use in 2026?
excerpt: A comprehensive comparison of Vision Transformers and Convolutional Neural Networks for computer vision tasks. We explore performance metrics, computational efficiency, and practical considerations for real-world deployment.

title: Real-World Challenges in Activity Recognition: Lessons Learned
excerpt: Insights from our latest research on deploying activity recognition systems in real-world scenarios. We discuss data imbalance, domain shift, and sensor noise challenges with practical solutions.

title: Model Interpretability in Healthcare AI: Why It Matters
excerpt: Exploring the critical importance of explainable AI in clinical settings. Learn how saliency maps, attention mechanisms, and other techniques help clinicians understand AI decision-making.

title: Efficient Deep Learning on Mobile Devices
excerpt: Guide to model compression, quantization, and knowledge distillation techniques for deploying deep learning models on resource-constrained mobile and edge devices.

title: The Future of Hybrid Intelligence Systems
excerpt: Analyzing the convergence of symbolic AI and deep learning. Why combining traditional AI reasoning with neural networks will shape the next generation of intelligent systems.

title: Getting Started with PyTorch: A Practical Guide for Researchers
excerpt: Step-by-step tutorial for beginners looking to start their deep learning journey with PyTorch. Includes practical examples and best practices from industry.
